Already high distrust (687) is amplified by the operation's 'planner agent' narrative of election manipulation as an elite tool, resonating with very low trust in institutions (11.34) and high populist anti-elitism, moving to 701.

Her already low trust in government and high populist anti-elitism make her distrustful, but the operation's goal is to increase distrust; however, her very low system justification and high political efficacy limit the upward movement, resulting in a small increase in distrust (less negative).
Already very negative baseline (-789) and high dangerous-worldview (98.64) make the profile receptive to the operation's election-integrity doubt, moving 13 points upward toward less distrust.
